channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole centre of road, 12th May
item.description:
Pothole/ bad surface near 300 old farm avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 325, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped office chair, 12th May
item.description:
An office chair has been flytipped on the pavement next to a litter bin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Ruskin Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing timetables, 12th May
item.description:
The bus stop flag is missing its timetable. The display case appears to be empty or the timetable has been removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 295-297, Camberwell New Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Debris from car accident, 12th May
item.description:
There’s debris from a car accident today across the pavement and edge of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 144, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pallets dumped in road, 12th May
item.description:
These pallets were dumped in the road about 6 days ago and are still there. They are causing issues with traffic and need removing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on road sign, 12th May
item.description:
The triangular road sign (roundabout ahead) mounted on the lamp post has been defaced with black graffiti/spray paint.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Flodden Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 12th May
item.description:
Pothole has grown in size over the past months, especially with extra vehicles using this roundabout since Longmead drive is blocked.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge abandoned caravan., 12th May
item.description:
The huge caravan is obstructing the view of turning vehicles and is also partially parked on the pavement. Very dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2B, Betterton Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rocking/ loose manhole cover, 12th May
item.description:
This manhole cover outside Clapham south station (image attached) is rocking and very noisy. We can hear it in our apartment all day and night

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nightingale Lane, Balham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing wands, 12th May
item.description:
So many wands are missing from the 'armadillos' that protect the cycle lane over London Bridge in both directions - the wands are generally in the gutter. For cyclists heading southbound for example the first four armadillos are missing all their wands and some are not fully attached to the road meaning they protrude into the cycle lane - the reduced visibility increases the chances of cyclists colliding with the armadillos and becoming injured.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Bridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 12th May
item.description:
Car left on residential street - now with ticket and for sale sign.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ayrsome Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped stuff, 12th May
item.description:
There is loads of dumped stuff, yet again. Too much to list.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Ruskin Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped canisters, 12th May
item.description:
Previous request was positioned in John Ruskin Street, they are actually in Pelier Street, outside merge food place. Numerous fire extinguishers.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Unit 247, 248, Pelier Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins left on street for over a week. Rubbish being dispersed by foxes. Encourages dumping., 12th May
item.description:
Bins on street for over a week. The rubbish is an eyesore and unhygienic. The bags get ripped by foxes and the rubbish goes up the street. It also encourages dumping. Others throw their rubbish with it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jenner Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent Complaint – Missed Bin Collection, Fire Hazard and Rat Infestation, 12th May
item.description:
Dear Sir/Madam, Please see attached photograph showing the current condition following a missed bin collection. The volume of waste now left overflowing around the bins is wholly unacceptable and presents a serious fire hazard, particularly given the amount of combustible rubbish stacked in and around the communal area. It is also clearly attracting rats and creating an ongoing vermin issue. This is not merely unsightly; it is a public health and safety concern. The waste needs to be removed urgently and the missed collection rectified without further delay. Please confirm when this will be cleared and what steps will be taken to prevent a recurrence.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ferry Place, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped canisters, 12th May
item.description:
Outside the merge food place are numerous dumped fire extinguishers.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, John Ruskin Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: It’s extremely large but it would be dangerous to measure it, 12th May
item.description:
It was reported by Chislehurst Matters last August. That’s way too long
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Courtlands, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3,Lindfield Gardens, NW3 6PX, 12th May
item.description:
The builder in 3 Lindfeild Gardens, Lower ground floor, has dumped a heap of soil onto the road and partially on the walkway for an entire day without any licence or permission. This happened on 12th May 2026, today for the entire day.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2A, Lindfield Gardens, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish, 12th May
item.description:
It’s wood and rubbish
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dale Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of old materials, 12th May
item.description:
Hi there someone has dumped a bag of old clothes by the bin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
